# num_ins ratchet: each line is "<prname> <count>".
# Captures the number of real instructions cmmcomp emits per example
# (excludes labels, directives and macros). regress.sh fails any run where
# a count grows. To intentionally update after a refactor that shrinks
# things, run: Scripts/regress.sh --update-size
ArcTan     74
ProcDTW    271
Seno       68
Sqrt       84
ZeroCross  140
algsimp    30
ctrl_flow  106
dirac_assign 177
empty_call 16
for_loop   90
func_combos 68
multiparam 32
pplus_arr  25
procBlind  628
procBlindOpt 597
proc_fft   325
proc_rls   334
proc_sim   97
sw_test    26
